code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import ta
    
    # Calculate adaptive moving averages
    short_ma = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['short_ma_window']).ema_indicator()
    long_ma = ta.trend.EMAIndicator(df['close'], window=params['long_ma_window']).ema_indicator()
    
    # Calculate volatility filter
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(
        high=df['high'], 
        low=df['low'], 
        close=df['close'], 
        window=params['atr_window']
    ).average_true_range()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(short_ma > long_ma) & (df['close'] > df['close'].shift(1) + atr * params['atr_multiplier'])] = 1
    signals[(short_ma < long_ma) & (df['close'] < df['close'].shift(1) - atr * params['atr_multiplier'])] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits trend-following behavior where adaptive moving average crossovers combined with volatility-filtered entries capture sustained directional moves.
